templates.name: House extension
templates.description: Rear, side or wraparound extension project record.

items.label: Access, protection and site setup
items.help: Record access limits, protection to existing rooms and working-hour constraints.

items.label: Measurements, surveys and investigations
items.help: List surveys or opening-up work required before a fixed price is reliable.

items.label: Waste removal and skip arrangements
items.help: State who supplies permits, skips and final clearance.

items.label: Excavation, foundations and drainage alterations
items.help: Include assumptions, provisional sums and treatment of unexpected ground conditions.

items.label: Structural openings, beams and temporary support
items.help: Record design responsibility and whether engineering is included.

items.label: Walls, insulation, roof structure and weatherproofing
items.help: Specify build-up, finish and who confirms performance requirements.

items.label: External windows, rooflights and doors
items.help: Capture product, finish, glazing, installation and certification expectations.

items.label: Electrical alterations and certification
items.help: Include points, consumer-unit impact, testing and certificate responsibility.

items.label: Plumbing, heating and drainage connections
items.help: Record appliance, radiator, underfloor-heating and commissioning assumptions.

items.label: Plastering, making good and decoration
items.help: Define the finish boundary so quotations are comparable.

items.label: Flooring, skirting, doors and joinery
items.help: State supply responsibility and whether existing finishes are matched.

approvalChecks.label: Planning permission or permitted development route checked
Local constraints and planning history checked
Building control route confirmed
Party wall position considered
Structural design responsibility recorded

completionDocuments.label: Planning decision, lawful development certificate or written route evidence
Electrical installation or minor works certificate
Window and door installation certificate where applicable
Final invoice and agreed variation record

templates.name: Loft conversion
templates.description: Roof-space conversion, dormer or rooflight-led project record.

items.label: Measured survey, headroom and roof form
items.help: Keep the measured assumptions used for design and pricing.

items.label: Stair position, guarding and making good
items.help: Define alterations on the floor below and the finish around the new stair.

items.label: Access, protection and scaffold strategy
items.help: Record whether work is external-first and how occupied rooms are protected.

items.label: New floor structure and load paths
items.help: Identify engineering responsibility and assumptions about existing walls.

items.label: Dormer, rooflight and roof alterations
items.help: Capture dimensions, cladding, flashings and tile/slate matching.

items.label: Insulation, ventilation and airtightness details
items.help: Record proposed build-up and ventilation strategy.

items.label: Fire doors, alarms and protected escape route works
items.help: Define all changes outside the loft room as part of the quote.

items.label: Electrical work, alarms and certification
items.help: Include circuits, sockets, lighting and test certificates.

items.label: Heating, plumbing and bathroom connections
items.help: State pressure, drainage and ventilation assumptions for bathrooms.

items.label: Plastering, joinery, decoration and floor finishes
items.help: Set the expected completed finish, not just the structural shell.

approvalChecks.label: Planning permission or permitted development route checked
Roof and local constraints checked
Building control route confirmed
Party wall position considered
Structural engineer responsibility recorded

completionDocuments.label: Planning decision or lawful development evidence
Electrical certificate and alarm test record

templates.name: Garden room or outbuilding
templates.description: Detached garden building, office or ancillary structure project record.

items.label: Intended use and occupancy assumptions
items.help: Record whether the building is incidental, work-related, sleeping accommodation or separately occupied.

items.label: Position, boundaries, height and dimensions
items.help: Use the same measured dimensions for checks, drawings and quotations.

items.label: Ground conditions, access and waste removal
items.help: Capture excavation, base assumptions and machinery access.

items.label: Base, foundation or ground system
items.help: State design assumptions, damp protection and finished floor level.

items.label: Frame, walls, roof and external finish
items.help: Specify structure, cladding, roof covering and weatherproofing.

items.label: Insulation, glazing, doors and ventilation
items.help: Record intended year-round performance and exact products.

items.label: Electrical supply, trenching and certification
items.help: Clarify cable route, consumer-unit work and testing.

items.label: Water, drainage or sanitary connections
items.help: Mark not applicable where the building has no plumbing.

items.label: Internal lining, heating, flooring and decoration
items.help: Define whether the quote is shell-only or ready to use.

approvalChecks.label: Planning route and permitted development limits checked
Use, sleeping and separate-occupation risk checked
Local restrictions and heritage context checked
Building regulations position checked
Electrical installation route confirmed

completionDocuments.label: Planning decision, lawful development evidence or retained route record
Building control completion evidence where applicable
Building, roof, glazing and product warranties

templates.name: Window or external-door replacement
templates.description: Replacement glazing, windows, external doors or rooflights project record.

items.label: Opening-by-opening schedule and measurements
items.help: Number every opening so all quotes cover the same units.

items.label: Frame, glazing, hardware and finish specification
items.help: Record product series, colour, glazing and security details.

items.label: Access, protection and removal assumptions
items.help: Include scaffold, parking, internal protection and disposal.

items.label: Removal, installation and weather sealing
items.help: Define installation method and treatment of reveals and sills.

items.label: Lintel and structural assumptions
items.help: Record what happens if support is absent or defective.

items.label: Internal and external making good
items.help: Specify plaster, render, trims, decoration and matching expectations.

items.label: Certification and registration
items.help: State who supplies compliance evidence and by when.

items.label: Product and installation warranty
items.help: Record length, provider, transferability and exclusions.

items.label: Final adjustment, cleaning and defect check
items.help: Include snagging and operation demonstration.

approvalChecks.label: Planning, listed-building and conservation sensitivity checked
Building regulations or competent-person route confirmed
Leasehold, freeholder or management-company consent considered
Final product schedule approved before order

templates.name: Internal renovation or structural alteration
templates.description: Wall removal, reconfiguration, kitchen/bathroom renovation or structural internal work.

items.label: Survey, opening-up and existing-services investigation
items.help: Record what is known and what remains provisional before demolition.

items.label: Structural design and temporary works
items.help: Define engineer, contractor and approval responsibilities.

items.label: Final layout, fixture and finish schedule
items.help: Use one agreed schedule for every quote.

items.label: Strip-out, protection and waste removal
items.help: State what is retained, reused, removed and disposed of.

items.label: Wall removal, beams, supports and making safe
items.help: Capture temporary support and inspection stages.

items.label: Partitions, doors and fire-safety alterations
items.help: Include acoustic or fire requirements where relevant.

items.label: Electrical alterations and certification
items.help: Include circuits, points, testing and consumer-unit work.

items.label: Plumbing, heating and gas work
items.help: Record isolation, relocation, commissioning and certification.

items.label: Plastering, tiling, flooring and decoration
items.help: Define substrate preparation and finished standard.

items.label: Kitchen, bathroom, joinery and appliance installation
items.help: State supply responsibility and final connection work.

approvalChecks.label: Planning or listed-building consent position checked
Building control route confirmed
Structural engineer scope and inspection responsibility recorded
Leasehold or freeholder consent considered
Age-related hazardous-material risk considered before disturbance

completionDocuments.label: Electrical installation or minor works certificate
Final invoice, variations and completion photographs
